purpose: Decide whether the current repo/session is ready for meaningful governed work before the agent continues.

current_objective.description: Current work objective in plain language.

host_context.description: Optional host context such as codex, claude, cursor, or generic.

startup_surfaces.description: Optional startup or package surfaces that should align with the schema package.

user_intent.description: Optional user-intent summary that should sharpen preflight assessment.

preflight_state.description: Bounded readiness result for the current repo/session.

recommended_path.description: Best next lane after the preflight pass.

active_gaps.description: Current install, schema, or session gaps that still pressure the work.

required_next_action.description: Single next action the agent or human should take after preflight.

adoption_state.description: Current adoption state for the harness in this repo and host context.

evidence_basis.description: What the preflight pass used to ground the result.

current_status.description: Current bounded work status as seen during preflight.

schema_state.description: Condensed schema reality summary used during preflight.
